summary:
The term "Bobble head doll syndrome" is not a recognized medical diagnosis and has no documented associations with hydrocephalus based on existing medical literature. The absence of any referenced connection between this non-medical phenomenon and hydrocephalus supports that they are unrelated.  

\boxed{B}
